name: Agent Evaluation
short_description: Running the A/B/C conditions against annotated tasks and computing the three project metrics.
detailed_description: Tags experimental tasks that execute scope-aware, scope-unaware, or scope-mismatched agents on the annotated benchmark and report Metric 1 (task success), Metric 2 (overconfident error rate), and Metric 3 (can-execute-now vs. must-request accuracy). Covers significance testing and stratified breakdowns by difficulty and granularity.
